headline: NU E Power Corp. Issues Clarifying Press Release
summary: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - March 19, 2026) - NU E Power Corp. (CSE: NUE) (OTC Pink: NUEPF) ("NU E" or the "Company") is issuing the following press release as clarifications to the November 3, 2025 press release.Hybrid Power Site Development OpportunitiesOn November 3, 2025, the Company announced that it had acquired hybrid power development assets from the portfolio of ACT Mid Market Ltd. ("ACT") including specific hybrid sites in Brazil, Mongolia, Canada, Malaysia, and Nigeria. The...
